name: 7) Thai-Style Brisket
method: Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat, then fry the brisket on both sides.
Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat, then fry the brisket on both sides.
Transfer the meat and its drippings to a 5-quart slow cooker.
Transfer the meat and its drippings to a 5-quart slow cooker.
In a small bowl, combine peanut butter, soy sauce, sesame oil, cilantro, lemon juice, garlic, pepper flakes and paprika
In a small bowl, combine peanut butter, soy sauce, sesame oil, cilantro, lemon juice, garlic, pepper flakes and paprika
Pour the sauce (Step 3) over brisket. Cover the slow cooker and cook for 8 to 9 hours on low heat. When done, remove the brisket from the slow cooker.
Pour the sauce (Step 3) over brisket. Cover the slow cooker and cook for 8 to 9 hours on low heat. When done, remove the brisket from the slow cooker.
Combine cornstarch and water in a bowl until smooth
Combine cornstarch and water in a bowl until smooth
Add the cornstarch (Step 5) into the slow cooker. Cover the slow cooker and cook on high for 30 minutes.
Add the cornstarch (Step 5) into the slow cooker. Cover the slow cooker and cook on high for 30 minutes.
Heat the remaining olive oil in a large skillet or sauté pan, then sauté the carrots, peppers, and onions until crisp-tender. You may want to add peanuts too.
Heat the remaining olive oil in a large skillet or sauté pan, then sauté the carrots, peppers, and onions until crisp-tender. You may want to add peanuts too.
Add the cooking juices (Step 6) into the vegetable mixture (Step 7) and mix well.
Add the cooking juices (Step 6) into the vegetable mixture (Step 7) and mix well.
Place rice on a large plate and top with meat (Step 9) and vegetables (Step 8).
Place rice on a large plate and top with meat (Step 9) and vegetables (Step 8).
